---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want. If possible, sketch the API surface:

- New HTTP endpoint?
- New CLI command or flag?
- New Rust struct / trait?
- New numeric constant in `parameters.md`?

## Alternatives considered

Why not just use an existing feature? What other approaches did you
think about, and why did you reject them?

## Spec + implementation impact

- Does this require a `forge-economics/spec/parameters.md` update?
- Does this break backwards compat on the OpenAI-compatible API?
- Does this require changes in forge-mesh?
- Is this a drop-in addition or a breaking change?

## Additional context

Screenshots, related issues, related PRs, or links to relevant work in
other projects (Bittensor, Akash, llama.cpp, etc.).
